case_title: MARIELLA EMILLIA MORALES VS. RODOLFO CALDERON RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,254.00 FILED BY MORALES, MARIELLA EMILLIA AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RODOLFO CALDERON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORALES, MARIELLA EMILLIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-19-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RODOLFO CALDERON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2012 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO DEC-20-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, MARIELLA EMILLIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RODOLFO CALDERON $1,254.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,254.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
